company.name: Asam Abd
company.slogan: Your regional moving partner in Hamm & surrounding area
company.description: Professional moving services in Hamm, Dortmund, Münster and all surrounding cities

hero.title: Professional Moving in Hamm & Surrounding Area
hero.subtitle: Your trusted moving partner for Hamm, Dortmund, Münster and all surrounding cities. From Ahlen to Bönen, from Unna to Kamen - we ensure smooth and stress-free moving with our experienced team and modern equipment.

about.subtitle: About Us
about.title: Your Local Moving Expert in the Region
about.description: With over 10 years of experience in the moving industry, we are your reliable partner in Hamm, Dortmund, Münster and all surrounding cities. From Ahlen to Bönen, from Unna to Kamen - we know the region and ensure a perfect move right at your doorstep.

gallery.subtitle: Gallery
gallery.title: Our Work in Pictures
gallery.description: Discover Asam Abd in action. Here you can see impressions of our professional moving services.

cta.description: Convinced by our work? Contact us for your individual quote.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: We offer a wide range of moving services
services.description: We offer you a comprehensive range of moving services, tailored to your individual needs.

items.title: Residential Moving
items.description: From small apartments to large houses - we transport your belongings safely and reliably.

items.title: Office Moving
items.description: Professional planning and execution of office relocations with minimal downtime.

items.title: Furniture Assembly
items.description: Professional disassembly and assembly of your furniture by our trained staff.

items.title: Packing Service
items.description: Professional packing of your items with high-quality materials.

items.title: Transport
items.description: Simple transport from A to B - safe and reliable for all your transportation needs.

items.title: House Clearance
items.description: Professional clearance and disposal of individual or multiple furniture items and household goods.

pricing.subtitle: Service Packages
pricing.title: Your Perfect Moving Package
pricing.description: Choose the right service package for your needs. From small transports to full-service moves - we have the right solution for you.

tiers.name: Small
tiers.description: Ideal for small apartments, student housing or individual furniture pieces.

tiers.name: Standard
tiers.description: Perfect for family apartments and medium households with additional services.

tiers.name: Premium
tiers.description: Full service for large households, offices and demanding moves.

items.name: Anna Smith
items.text: Very professional service. Everything was carefully packed and transported. Highly recommended!

items.name: Michael Weber
items.text: Our office relocation was perfectly planned and executed. Minimal downtime and very competent team.

items.name: Laura Meyer
items.text: Fast, reliable, and friendly. The prices are fair and transparent. Would use again!

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Your regional contact partner
contact.description: Planning your move in Hamm, Dortmund, Münster or one of the surrounding cities? Contact us for a free quote - we are your local partner on site.
